verdict.trial_title: A Clinical Study to Test if an Investigational Treatment Called BNT326 is Safe and Potentially Beneficial When Used Alone or in Combination With Other Investigational Treatments Such as BNT327, for People With Advanced Malignant Tumors
verdict.cohort_label: Cohort 1C — EGFR exon 19del/L858R, 1–2 prior lines incl. 3rd-gen TKI, progressed

criterion.text: Documented positive test results for an EGFR-sensitizing mutation (Exon 21-L858R and 19del)

criteria.evidence_span: NGS: EGFR exon 19 deletion (p.E746_A750del). ALK/ROS1 negative.
criteria.rationale: EGFR sensitizing mutation documented on NGS.

criterion.text: Prior lines must include a third-generation EGFR TKI with progression

criteria.evidence_span: First-line osimertinib 80 mg daily started 2025-09; radiographic progression 2026-05 (RECIST 1.1).
criteria.rationale: Third-generation EGFR TKI with documented progression.

criterion.text: Have ECOG performance status of 0 or 1
Have measurable disease defined by RECIST v1.1

criteria.evidence_span: CT chest: RUL target lesion 2.4 cm, measurable per RECIST 1.1.

criterion.text: Have adequate organ and bone marrow function within 7 days before randomization/enrollment

criteria.rationale: Adequate organ and marrow function documented.

criterion.text: Have LVEF <50% by either echocardiography or multi-gated acquisition (scanning) within 28 days before randomization/enrollment

criteria.rationale: LVEF ≥50% on file — exclusion does not apply.

criterion.text: Have a history of interstitial lung disease (ILD)/pneumonitis that required steroids

criteria.evidence_span: No history of interstitial lung disease. No prior chemotherapy.
criteria.rationale: No ILD history — exclusion does not apply.
